name: Frozen Fruit Salad
recipeIngredient: 6 oz. can frozen orange juice concentrate, thawed
small jar maraschino cherries, cut up and juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve sugar in boiling water.
2. Mix all ingredients together.
3. Freeze mixture in a plastic or glass container, stirring occasionally until frozen.
4. Cover for storage in the freezer.
5. Serve partially thawed.
